title: syzygium tinombalum
intro: Syzygium tinombalum, a species of plant in the family Myrtaceae, is commonly known as tinombalum or ironwood. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Syzygium tinombalum include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Syzygium tinombalum is often made into a decoction by boiling the bark and leaves in water to treat various ailments.
